name: simplehuman 45L Rectangular Step Trash Can
reason: I love simplehuman products. Durable and easy to use! And no gimmicks.

name: simplehuman 9oz Touch-Free Sensor Soap Pump
reason: I love simplehuman products. Durable and easy to use! And no gimmicks.

name: Ridge Magnetic Power Bank 10K mAh — Basecamp Orange
reason: MKBHD recommends this and it is one of the best design I've seen for N in 1 power bank. Only downside is the price.

name: Anker MagGo 3-in-1 Foldable Charging Station
reason: Anker is a brand I trust. Their changers are great to have.

name: Takara Transformers Masterpiece MP-11 Starscream
reason: I LOVE the transformer masterpiece series. And MP11 is one of the best. Very well design!

name: Skechers GOwalk Max Athletic Walking Sneaker
reason: My go to shoes. Comfortable, easy to put on/take off!

name: La Crosse Technology 14" Atomic Wall Clock
reason: Set it and forget it — this clock syncs to the atomic clock signal so it's always perfectly accurate. Automatically adjusts for daylight saving time too. Clean, simple design that looks great in any room.

name: uni-ball Roller Ball Pens, 0.5mm Micro, Blue (12 Pack)
reason: San Altman recommended this. And I also like them.

name: Victorinox Compact Swiss Army Knife (15 Functions)
reason: I have like 10 of them at home, in different places. So versatile and easy to use.

name: Amazon Kindle Scribe (64GB) 2024 — Metallic Jade
reason: The best e-reader for note-takers. My family likes them a LOT.

name: Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Max (Wi-Fi 6E)
reason: Turn your TV into a small computer, where you can install all sorts of apps, including VPN and such.

name: Moon Pod Bean Bag Chair
reason: This is what I crash in the middle of day when I am tired  from work.

name: Bandai PG Unleashed RX-78-2 Gundam 1/60 Model Kit
reason: The pinnacle of Gundam model kits! The ONE!

name: Takara Tomy Transformers Masterpiece MP-13 Soundwave
reason: Another masterpiece and the design is top notch!

name: QWERKYWRITER 2 — Black Gold Typewriter Keyboard
reason: A gorgeous retro-typewriter mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Blue switches, hot-swappable PCB, and wireless connectivity. It caught my eye the first time I saw it in my friends house.

name: Saint Cloth Myth EX Libra Dohko (Revival Ver.)
reason: The Saint Cloth series has a special spot in my heart. My childhood dream.

name: Logitech MX Master 4 Wireless Mouse — Graphite
reason: MX3, MX4 are all great mouses. My main mouse at home.

name: Blue Yeti USB Microphone — Blackout
reason: If you do zoom conf, you need to get one! Makes your voice much better to be heard!

name: Keychron K3 V2 Ultra-Slim Wireless Mechanical Keyboard
reason: My main keyboard. Reasonable price and easy to use.

name: Samsung 49" ViewFinity S95UC Curved Ultrawide Monitor
reason: Replace two monitors with one immersive 49" ultrawide. Dual QHD resolution, 120Hz, USB-C with 90W charging, and a built-in KVM switch to control two PCs. The 1000R curve wraps around your field of vision perfectly. A productivity beast.

name: ASUS Zenbook S 14 (UX5406) — 3K OLED, Core Ultra 7, 32GB
reason: If you are looking for a ultra think laptop (that's not apple), this is the one. I did lots of research and ended on this guy.

name: Apple AirPods Pro 3
reason: Airpods are generational for Apple. Prob the most popular product after iPhone.

name: CATAN Board Game (6th Edition)
reason: The best board game I know. :)

name: Crave Naturals Glide Thru Detangling Brush (2-Pack)
reason: A friend recommended to me, and I have many at home. Works well for kids!

name: The Goal (40th Anniversary Edition) — Goldratt & Cox
reason: A must-read business novel that teaches the Theory of Constraints through a gripping factory turnaround story. Our CEO's highest recommended book.

name: The North Face Recon Everyday Laptop Backpack
reason: I love north face products. High quality yet reasonable price. This backpack is super well designed.

name: Apple Watch Ultra 3 (49mm, GPS + Cellular)
reason: Its long battery makes it the only choice for me.
